content: Is anyone looking into wrapping VMA management in Rust? I imagine having something like https://github.com/Rust-for-Linux/linux/blob/rust/rust/kernel/file_operations.rs#L311 but for vm_operations_struct etc. could be useful
No one is working on this that I know of. Indeed it would be useful, in fact I will need it in binder eventually. If it's something that interests you, go for it!
